resultList.dtldesc: Contemporary 2 BHK Flat for Sale in MVN Aero One, Devanahalli, Bangalore::::Discover a modern lifestyle in this well-designed 2 BHK apartment located in MVN Aero One, one of Devanahalli's emerging residential developments. Positioned in a rapidly growing neighbourhood near Brigade Orchards South Gate, this ready-to-move residence offers a perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and contemporary living. Ideal for families, working professionals, and investors, the property enjoys excellent connectivity while providing a peaceful residential environment.::::Property Specifications::::Situated on the 3rd floor of a 13-storey tower, this thoughtfully planned apartment features a carpet area of 813 sq. ft. and a super built-up area of 1212 sq. ft. The home comprises two spacious bedrooms, two well-appointed bathrooms, and two balconies that allow ample natural light and fresh air to flow throughout the living spaces. The apartment overlooks landscaped gardens, creating a serene and refreshing ambience. The living and dining areas are designed in a combined layout, enhancing space utilisation and providing an inviting setting for family gatherings. The kitchen is practical and functional, while premium wooden and tiled flooring adds elegance and durability to the interiors. Offered in unfurnished condition, the property provides the flexibility to design and furnish the home according to your preferences. The development offers 24-hour water supply, 100% power backup, professional security services, CCTV surveillance, and multiple lifts for seamless accessibility. The project also features dedicated recreational amenities, including a kids' play area and kids' splash pool, creating a vibrant environment for families. Visitor parking and service lifts further contribute to the convenience and functionality of the community.::::Locality::::Located in Devanahalli, one of Bangalore's most promising growth corridors, the property benefits from excellent connectivity to major roads, business hubs, and the international airport. Essential services such as schools, hospitals, supermarkets, banks, ATMs, and public transport facilities are available within approximately 1 km of the project. The strategic location, combined with ongoing infrastructure development in the area, makes this apartment an attractive choice for both end-users and investors seeking long-term value.::::This ready-to-move 2 BHK apartment at MVN Aero One offers modern comforts, quality construction, and a well-connected location, making it an excellent opportunity to own a stylish home in Devanahalli, Bangalore.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience comfortable and well equipped living with this spacious 3 BHK apartment located in the prime residential locality of AECS Layout, Bangalore. This ready to move property offers a perfect combination of modern amenities, functional interiors and strong connectivity, making it an ideal choice for families seeking a well balanced urban lifestyle.Property SpecificationsSpanning a super built up area of 1416 sq. ft, this thoughtfully designed apartment comprises 3 well sized bedrooms, 2 bathrooms and 2 balconies, ensuring ample space, ventilation and natural light. The layout includes a practical living and dining arrangement, suitable for comfortable family living. Bathrooms are fitted with geysers, adding to everyday convenience. Electrical fittings such as lights and fans are already installed across all rooms, allowing immediate usability. The area is known for its organised layout, greenery and availability of essential amenities, making it a self sufficient and convenient residential destination.With its strong infrastructure, proximity to major employment hubs and well established community, AECS Layout continues to be a sought after location for homebuyers in Bangalore.
